title: Cured Condensed Comfort Cake
description: A rich dessert combining the textures of cured meats with the sweetness of comfort food.
instructions: 2. Line a 9-inch (23cm) round cake pan with parchment paper.
3. In a food processor, finely chop cured bacon.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
5. Add condensed milk, granulated sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract to the mixing bowl.
6. Stir in chopped bacon, flour, and mix until well combined.
7. Pour batter into prepared cake pan.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
10. Once cooled, refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
